descFull: Your personal 'Mini Shodan'. A high-performance network reconnaissance engine designed for massive scale asset discovery. Specializes in identifying unsecured services (Open RTSP Cameras, No-Auth VNC, Anonymous FTP) and deeply fingerprints device models with a beautiful real-time terminal dashboard.
